transcript:
Agent: Thank you for calling First National Bank. This is Daniel speaking. How can I help you today?

Customer: Hi Daniel. I need to update my direct deposit information and also report a suspicious charge on my account.

Agent: Of course. Let me verify your identity first. Can I get your full Social Security Number?

Customer: Sure. It is 412-68-9031.

Agent: Thank you. And your date of birth?

Customer: July 22nd 1981. So 07/22/1981.

Agent: Perfect. I have your account here, Patricia. What is the suspicious charge?

Customer: There is a charge for $340 from a merchant called NTLX-STORE on May 12th. I did not make that purchase.

Agent: I can see that charge. I am flagging it as disputed right now and initiating a chargeback. Your account number ending in 7734 will be credited within 5 business days.

Customer: Thank you. Can you also update my direct deposit? My new employer routing number is 021000021 and my account number is 8834712290.

Agent: Got it. Routing 021000021 and account 8834712290. I have updated that. Is the old direct deposit from Meridian Corp?

Customer: Yes that is correct.

Agent: Updated. Now for the suspicious charge, I recommend we reissue your debit card. Can you confirm the card number on file so I can cancel it?

Customer: It ends in 4891. The full number is 4532 8812 3341 4891, expiry 08/26.

Agent: Thank you. I am cancelling that card now and issuing a replacement to your address on file at 48 Lakeview Drive, Portland. You should receive it within 3 business days.

Customer: Great. Also can you update my email to patricia.nguyen@workmail.com and my phone to 971-554-8820?

Agent: Done. Email updated to patricia.nguyen@workmail.com and phone to 971-554-8820. Is there anything else I can help with?

Customer: No that covers everything. Thank you Daniel.

Agent: You are welcome Patricia. Have a great day.
